name: YouTube Transcript Cleaner
description: Clean rough transcripts into readable Markdown while preserving the original meaning.

assignments.name: workflow_goal
assignments.value: Clean a rough transcript into readable Markdown while preserving meaning and making it useful for repurposing.

assignments.name: video_or_source_title
assignments.value: Local AI Workflow Notes - Sample Transcript

assignments.name: source_type
assignments.value: YouTube transcript, podcast transcript, meeting transcript, or rough dictation

assignments.name: transcript_text
assignments.value: um today we are going to talk about like local AI and why it matters so basically if you have notes and workflows and you want privacy you can use local models and then uh connect them into tools like n8n or obsidian and the point is not to make everything fancy the point is to make repeatable systems you can trust

assignments.name: content_goal
assignments.value: Create a readable article section from a rough spoken transcript.

assignments.name: audience
assignments.value: People learning practical local AI workflows

assignments.name: cleanup_level
assignments.value: Light rewrite: remove filler and improve structure, but preserve the speaker voice.

assignments.name: intended_output
assignments.value: Clean Markdown with key takeaways, repurposing ideas, cleanup notes, and human review flags.

assignments.name: style_notes
assignments.value: Practical, clear, beginner-friendly, and non-salesy. Keep the voice natural.

assignments.name: must_preserve
assignments.value: Meaning, sequence of ideas, important terms, tool names, and any useful phrasing from the speaker.

assignments.name: must_not_do
assignments.value: Do not invent facts, fake timestamps, fake quotes, links, or examples that are not in the transcript.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = { ...$json };

const prompt = [
  'You are a transcript editor and content repurposing assistant.',
  '',
  'Workflow: GP-WF-005 - YouTube Transcript Cleaner',
  'Problem it solves: Raw video transcripts are difficult to read, quote, or repurpose.',
  'Main task: Clean a rough transcript into readable Markdown while preserving the speaker meaning.',
  '',
  'Input data:',
  JSON.stringify(input, null, 2),
  '',
  'Editing rules:',
  '- Preserve the original meaning and order of ideas.',
  '- Remove filler words, repeated phrases, false starts, and transcript junk.',
  '- Improve readability without inventing new claims, facts, names, numbers, links, or examples.',
  '- Keep the speaker voice natural. Do not turn the transcript into corporate filler.',
  '- If the transcript is thin, say what is missing instead of pretending it is complete.',
  '- If the user asks for an article section, create a polished section from the transcript but keep it grounded in the source.',
  '- If timestamps or speaker labels are present, preserve useful ones when they help readability.',
  '- Use Markdown headings and short paragraphs.',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact shape:',
  '{',
  '  "document_title": "Short clear title",',
  '  "summary": "Plain-English summary of what was cleaned.",',
  '  "cleaned_transcript_markdown": "Cleaned transcript or repurposed section in Markdown.",',
  '  "key_takeaways": ["Takeaway 1", "Takeaway 2", "Takeaway 3"],',
  '  "repurposing_ideas": ["Repurposing idea 1", "Repurposing idea 2", "Repurposing idea 3"],',
  '  "cleanup_notes": ["What changed during cleanup"],',
  '  "needs_human_review": ["Anything that should be checked by a human"],',
  '  "next_steps": ["Practical next step 1", "Practical next step 2", "Practical next step 3"],',
  '  "review_note": "Short human review reminder."',
  '}',
  '',
  'Final reminder: output JSON only. No Markdown fence. No explanation before or after the JSON.'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...input, prompt } }];
